disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Tense deep-seated clear vesicles on the soles WITH concurrent web-space maceration, moccasin scaling and nail change
trigger_question_examples: Are there tense clear blisters on the soles AND macerated scaly toe-webs / scaly soles / thickened nails?
Do the toe-webs look peeling and scaly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, tense clear blisters on the soles, plus peeling macerated toe-webs, scaly soles and slightly thickened yellow toenails.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Blisters contain CLEAR (not yellow/purulent) fluid; no thick honey crust or flaccid easily-rupturing bullae (bullous-impetigo/pustulosis screen)
trigger_question_examples: Is the fluid clear, or yellow/pus-like? Are the blisters tense/deep or flaccid and easily bursting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The fluid is clear, and the blisters are tense/deep, not flaccid, and no golden crusts.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No thick yellow pus in the blisters, no hot spreading redness up the ankle, no fever (secondary-infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any thick yellow pus, hot spreading redness up the ankle, or fever?
Is the redness climbing the ankle or are you feverish?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No pus, no spreading hot redness up the ankle, and no fever.
